model: Rasanen statistical backreaction / peak model (Buchert averaging)
distance: 1+z=1/a (avg scale factor); D_A obeys FRW-form ODE driven by H(zbar)+rho0 with null shear neglected => D_M=int dz/E, D_H=1/E (units c/H0)
E2_closure: E^2=Om0(1+z)^3+OR0(1+z)^2+OQ0(1+z)^6 (Buchert first integral, integrability-fixed); late-mode confines OQ to z<~1
peak_model_published_bound: |Omega_Q|<0.04 always, q=-addot/aH^2>0 always (NO acceleration); |Omega_Q|>~0.2 needed for observed accel
verdict: Does NOT resolve tension. SN demand OQ0~-0.06 to -0.07 (q0<0) exceeding the published peak-model ceiling |OQ0|<0.04; within the physical bound q0>0 (no accel) and SN fit poor (chi2 1431 vs 1402). BAO+CMB H0=61-63 < LCDM 68.6 (wrong direction). SN-preferred Om0=0.05 vs BAO+CMB Om0=0.32 inconsistent. Joint dBIC=+65 (similar to timescape +67).
